how-it-works.title: How It Works
how-it-works.description: Three steps from zero to live backlink

items.title: Submit Your Target
items.description: Enter your target URL and anchor text. Choose a platform or let our AI auto-select the highest-authority site for your niche.

items.title: AI Agent Deploys
items.description: Our CrewAI-powered agent mimics real human behavior — scrolling, clicking, and typing at natural speeds — to publish your backlink safely within 48 hours.

items.title: Receive Proof Report
items.description: Get a Proof Report with the live URL and a high-resolution screenshot stored securely on the cloud. Your evidence, always accessible.

features.title: Why LinkFlow AI
features.description: The backlink platform built on transparency, precision, and proof

items.title: 100% Transparent Delivery
items.description: Every backlink comes with a live URL and a cloud-hosted screenshot. No guesswork — see exactly where your link landed.

items.title: Human-Like AI Agents
items.description: Powered by CrewAI, our agents simulate authentic human interactions — mouse movements, scrolling, natural typing delays — to stay invisible to search engine algorithms.

items.title: 48-Hour Guarantee
items.description: From submission to live proof in under 48 hours. If the task fails due to platform downtime, your credit is automatically refunded. Zero risk.

items.title: Curated High-Authority Platforms
items.description: We maintain a vetted library of DA 50+ sites including Blogger, Reddit, Medium, and more. View live success rates on our Platforms page.

items.title: Full Anchor Text Control
items.description: You set the target URL and anchor text. Our AI generates contextual surrounding content to make every link look 100% organic.

items.title: Privacy-First Security
items.description: OAuth-only signup — no passwords stored. Task data encrypted at rest. Request full data deletion anytime from your dashboard.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know before your first deployment.
faq.tip: Still have questions? Our engineers respond within 12 hours at support@linkflowai.app

items.question: Will these links get my site penalized?
items.answer: No. Unlike bulk bot tools, LinkFlow AI uses Agentic Workflows that mimic natural human interactions — mouse movements, scrolling, and delays. We focus on quality platforms and contextual placements to ensure search engine safety.

items.question: What kind of platforms do you support?
items.answer: We maintain a curated library of high-authority sites including Blogger, Reddit, Medium, and more. You can view live success rates on the Platforms page.

items.question: How do I know the link is live?
items.answer: Every successful task generates a Proof Report containing the Live URL and a high-resolution screenshot stored on our secure cloud. Evidence you can verify independently at any time.

items.question: Can I use my own anchor texts?
items.answer: Absolutely. You have full control over target URLs and anchor texts. Our AI even assists in generating surrounding content to make the link look 100% natural.

items.question: What is the 48-Hour Guarantee?
items.answer: From the moment you submit a task, our AI starts deployment immediately. We guarantee a successful submission with a live screenshot proof within 48 hours. If the task fails due to platform downtime, your credit is instantly refunded.

items.question: Do you offer a free trial?
items.answer: Yes. Every new account gets 1 Free Credit on signup — no credit card required — to experience our AI's precision on a real backlink task.
